title: Maintain a quarantine approved laboratory
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Maintain a quarantine approved laboratory demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Interpret and communicate quarantine requirements

pcs.text: Maintain information on quarantine and biosecurity requirements impacting laboratory operations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain information on quarantine and biosecurity requirements impacting laboratory operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain information on quarantine and biosecurity requirements impacting laboratory operations.

pcs.text: Distribute information on responsibilities of work team to maintain laboratory's compliance according to state and federal regulations

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Distribute information on responsibilities of work team to maintain laboratory's compliance according to state and federal regulations.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Explain implications of non-compliance with regulations to personnel within laboratory.
